notes: YouTube is not a viable source for structured route extraction. No routes were directly sourced from YouTube videos. The routes below were surfaced by blog and news sources that discuss commuter video content or reference YouTube-adjacent community knowledge. Confidence is low for all entries.

routes.route_name: SM North EDSA - MOA via MRT-3
routes.frequency_notes: MRT every few minutes; jeep from Taft to MOA frequent
routes.notes: Multimodal route: MRT-3 + jeepney feeder. Mentioned in Manila Commuter blog, not directly from YouTube video. Transfer point is MRT-3 Taft Ave station.

routes.route_name: Katipunan Ave - Philippine General Hospital via LRT
routes.notes: Multimodal: LRT-2 + 250m walk + LRT-1. Manila Commuter blog, referenced as common commute route. Not directly from YouTube.
Jeep from Eastwood to Cubao, then bus toward Baclaran/Coastal. Manila Commuter blog.

routes.route_name: Robinson's Novaliches - Park Square Makati P2P
routes.notes: Mentioned in Manila Commuter blog. Fare ₱120 flat. Weekday service only. Not verified via YouTube.

routes.route_name: Alabang - Festival Mall (Alabang South Station Jeepney)
routes.notes: Philippine Primer south Manila guide. Sign reads 'Alabang South Station'. Short feeder route within Alabang area.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Blvd - E. Rodriguez / Brgy. Ugong, Vargas Ave (T276)
routes.destination: E. Rodriguez / Brgy. Ugong / Vargas Ave
routes.notes: Route T276 from PNA article about LTFRB opening 16 new jeepney routes in Metro Manila. Modern jeepney route. Fare based on LTFRB modern jeepney minimum ₱15.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Blvd - E. Rodriguez / Ortigas Ave (T277)
routes.notes: Route T277 from PNA article. Modern jeepney route under LTFRB route expansion.

routes.destination: E. Rodriguez (partial info, destination cut off in source)
routes.notes: Route T278 from PNA article. Destination truncated in source text. Modern jeepney route.
